projectDescription: Visual Studio Code extension for SVG preview, optimization, and enhanced development workflow.
keyFeatures: Live SVG preview panel in Explorer sidebar
Hover preview with instant SVG visualization
Gutter icons showing SVG previews in code
Dark background and grid overlay toggles
publicApiSurface: betterSvg.optimize - Command to optimize SVG files
betterSvg.optimizeFromHover - Command to optimize inline SVGs from hover
betterSvg.preview - Webview panel for SVG preview
betterSvg.autoReveal - Setting to auto-reveal preview panel
betterSvg.autoCollapse - Setting to auto-collapse preview panel
betterSvg.enableHover - Setting to enable hover preview
betterSvg.showGutterPreview - Setting to show gutter icons
betterSvg.defaultColor - Setting for default currentColor value
betterSvg.removeClasses - Setting to remove class attributes during optimization
SvgPreviewProvider - Webview provider for preview panel
SvgHoverProvider - Hover provider for inline SVG preview
convertJsxToSvg - Transform JSX SVG syntax to valid SVG XML
convertSvgToJsx - Transform SVG XML to JSX syntax
prepareForOptimization - Prepare SVG content for SVGO optimization
finalizeAfterOptimization - Restore framework-specific syntax after optimization
